full_text:
Pang Hui 龐會
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Hui (龐會). Pang De’s son. Had Guan Yu’s clan exterminated after Shu’s surrender. Pang Hui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
